Wait, the formula in the problem is floor((1 + sqrt(8n-7))/2). The code is correct. But when n=55, let's compute:

sqrt(8*55 -7) = sqrt(440-7)=sqrt(433)=~20.809. (1+20.809)/2 ≈10.904, floor is 10. So 2*55 -10 = 110-10=100. Correct.
